name: cSigma Finance
description: cSigma is a blockchain-based protocol that connects global borrowers and lenders by standardizing and streamlining the commercial lending process, empowering credit service providers and pool managers while offering crypto-uncorrelated yield opportunities to stablecoin holders transparently and efficiently.

name: Pencil Finance
description: Pencil Finance is a DeFi lending protocol that tokenizes real-world student loans, offering risk-adjusted yields via a dual-tranche system backed by off-chain repayments.
